column11: This tab is a combined view of the Finance Summary Budget & Finance Summary Non-Budget tabs, specifically created for finance
column14: HOW TO CHOOSE MONTH: In the Finance Summary Budget AND Finance Summary Non-Budget tabs, choose which months to pull. These figures are then automatically pulled and summarized on this tab, but you MUST select the months you want on those tabs.
column18: ***Note to editors: there are hidden columns used to pass data through(S-AD, rows 6-200)
